subcodes.first_line: Thou art remembered in the presence of the Wronged One, and thy name hath been inscribed by the Pen of Destiny. Give thanks unto thy Lord for this bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکرت لدی المظلوم مذکور و اسمت از یراعه تقدیر مرقوم اشکری ربک بهذا الفضل
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
